title: callicarpa pedunculata var. chinensis
intro: Callicarpa pedunculata var. chinensis, also known as the Chinese Purple Fruited Callicarpa, is a plant species belonging to the Lamiaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to promote digestion and relieve symptoms of indigestion and diarrhea. The health benefits of Callicarpa pedunculata var. chinensis include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve circulation, and exhibit antibacterial properties. In traditional Chinese medicine, the plant is often prepared as a tea or infusion, and it can also be used to make herbal extracts and tinctures for medicinal purposes.
